summary: Two-storey rectangular modern block with a raised white border/platform, sandstone-style middle walls with horizontal white trim bands, narrow horizontal windows on both floors, a brick-tiled recessed flat roof edged with stone slabs. The building sits centered inside a dug-out dirt perimeter.

shape.overall_form: simple rectangular box with a raised border/platform and flat recessed roof
shape.symmetry: symmetrical on the visible facades (mirrored left-right and front-back appears likely)

elements: narrow horizontal windows (two rows, one per floor)
raised white perimeter platform / short parapet around base
brick recessed flat roof with stone slab edging
vertical white corner/column blocks aligning trims
rebuild_hints: Footprint: build a roughly 9x9 rectangular box elevated one block on a 1-block-wide white (quartz-like) platform border.
Walls: use sandstone-like blocks for main wall faces with a continuous white trim band (quartz) horizontally between floors and white corner columns.
Windows: place narrow 1x2 or 1x1 horizontal window openings repeated along each facade in the middle of each floor's wall band.
Roof: set brick blocks recessed one block from outer wall; cap roof perimeter with stone slabs to form coping.
Site: surrounding ground is lowered/excavated dirt forming a rim around the platform.
uncertainties: Exact block types: sandstone vs smooth sandstone vs chiseled sandstone not certain (labeled as 'sandstone').
Trim material identified as quartz based on color; could be another white block (e.g., diorite) though quartz is more likely.
Dimensions are estimated from pixel views; actual block counts (width/depth/height) may differ by ±2 blocks.
Window exact dimensions (height in blocks) uncertain; they appear as narrow horizontal strips possibly 1 block tall.
